title: Light navy/green gradient theme refresh, glowing buttons, and logo-focused login/loading (fix blank UI)

requirements.text: Replace the current dark blue/purple-heavy global backgrounds with a lighter, readable navy/green gradient across the entire app (AppShell, Login page, and AuthGate loading screen), ensuring text and surfaces maintain strong contrast and are clearly visible.

quotes: Entire app I want a light but gradient background
I can't see anything in this draft

acceptanceCriteria: All main pages (Chat, Maker, Analytics, Gallery, Shop) display a light navy/green gradient background without appearing blank.
Text on headings, body copy, and cards meets readable contrast against the new background (no near-invisible text).
The Login screen and the AuthGate loading screen use the same updated light navy/green gradient direction (no dark slate + blue/purple gradient).

requirements.text: Update the app’s color tokens and gradients to de-emphasize purple (including the current primary/accent hues) in favor of a light navy + green palette, and apply these tokens consistently to headings, cards, borders, and UI accents.

quotes: I want a light navy blue or green gradient background

acceptanceCriteria: Primary/accent styling across pages no longer relies on purple-dominant gradients (e.g., blue→purple) and instead reflects navy/green styling.
Common UI elements (cards, borders, muted text, highlights) remain visually consistent across modules.

requirements.text: Implement animated/glowing button styling across the app for primary and key call-to-action buttons, while respecting prefers-reduced-motion (reduce/disable glow animations when the user requests reduced motion).
acceptanceCriteria: Primary CTA buttons (e.g., Login button, “Get Started”, major submit actions) have a visible glow/animated emphasis on hover/focus.
When prefers-reduced-motion is enabled, button animations are reduced or disabled while maintaining a clear static hover/focus state.
Buttons remain readable and accessible (focus ring visible, no low-contrast text).

requirements.text: Increase logo emphasis on the app’s “front page” (Login screen) and on the AuthGate loading screen by adding a clearer, larger logo/wordmark treatment and placing it prominently in the layout.

quotes: I wantvthat front page , loading page also focused more in my web app

acceptanceCriteria: Login screen shows a prominent logo/wordmark at the top of the card (or above the card) that is clearly visible on the new light gradient.
AuthGate loading screen includes the same logo/wordmark (not only a spinner and “Loading...”).

requirements.text: Keep existing icons and any current imagery unless a change is necessary for readability/consistency, and ensure the UI remains icon-forward rather than adding new full-size decorative images from the BrandBoost references without explicit placement instructions.

quotes: I want only icons not all images
No let it be same if any change needed you can

acceptanceCriteria: No new large decorative images are added to pages without explicit user placement instructions.
Existing icons remain in place; any icon/image changes are limited to fixes needed to support the new lighter theme and readability.

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the reported “blank/Can’t see anything” experience by ensuring the authenticated and unauthenticated routes always render visible content (including during initialization), and that no page relies on near-black overlays that obscure content on the updated light gradient background.

quotes: I can't see anything in this draft

acceptanceCriteria: On first load: users see either (a) the Login page (if signed out) or (b) the app shell with visible page content (if signed in), without a blank screen state.
During identity initialization: the loading screen is visible and branded (logo + loading indicator) and does not render as near-black on near-black.
Cards/surfaces are adjusted so content does not blend into the background (no invisible borders/text due to low-contrast overlays).

constraints: Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
Backend must remain single-actor (no new backend services).
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Adding new pages or new product modules beyond theme/logo/loading/button updates.
Implementing or integrating third-party authentication beyond Internet Identity.
Adding full BrandBoost screenshots as page backgrounds or large content sections without explicit user instructions for placement.

required: Modern minimal monogram logo with navy + green palette on transparent background (busy-ai-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Horizontal wordmark/logo lockup in navy + green on transparent background (busy-ai-wordmark.dim_1200x300.png)
Simple favicon mark derived from the monogram in navy + green (busy-ai-favicon.dim_64x64.png)
